svg.text: Active Rio Texas clergy: churches served over a career
237 clergy currently serving a local church (extension ministry, leave, and retired excluded) · 2025 Journal clergy records
A · Each dot is one clergyperson
B · Mobility: churches served per decade of service
pooled across each class (classes with at least 3 clergy)
Source: Rio Texas Annual Conference Journal 2025, Section I (Clergy Records). Gender/race not shown — not recorded in the journal.
